name: Sourmilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients quickly until combined.
2. Roll the dough to about 1/2-inch thickness.
3. Fold and roll again, if necessary.
4. Cut out shapes with a biscuit cutter.
5. Place the biscuits on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake in a hot oven at 400°F for about 10 minutes.
The sour milk can be neutralized by adding more soda if needed.
